news.headline: Economists and bankers in Europe express confusion over unpredictable policies, impacting economic outlook.
news.summary: A conference in Europe attended by central bankers, economists, and analysts reflected a sense of confusion as they deliberated on the uncertainties surrounding trade policy and geopolitics.

news.headline: Entropy Robotics partners with SRI to enhance autonomous navigation in tough conditions. AI startup, SRI collaborate on advanced tech; dates back to March 12, 2025.
news.summary: Today, in Montclair, New Jersey, Entropy Robotics, a groundbreaking startup specializing in AI-powered autonomous software for robots and drones, revealed their latest partnership. The company has entered into a strategic collaboration with SRI, a significant player in the field. Through this collaboration, Entropy Robotics will be working on an Autonomous Navigation project with SRI International, emphasizing the importance of advancing technology in the realm of robotics and artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Soft2Bet to launch award-winning iGaming solutions in US, including MEGA product. New brand in NJ. - PRNewswire, March 12, 2025.
news.summary: Soft2Bet, a rapidly expanding company, will soon introduce a revolutionary MEGA product that aims to redefine gamification, boost engagement, and tailor player experiences. The new iGaming brand by Soft2Bet is set to launch in New Jersey, marking a significant step for the company. The announcement was made in SLIEMA, Malta on March 12, 2025. This move is expected to capture the attention of consumers and industry competitors alike, as it represents a major development in the realm of online gaming. With ambitious plans and innovative strategies, Soft2Bet is positioning itself as a key player in the market.

news.headline: Ana Céspedes appointed CEO of Vitamin Angels, a global health leader. Strong commitment to innovation and health equity.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in Goleta, California, Vitamin Angels revealed the selection of Ana Céspedes as the new Chief Executive Officer. Céspedes, a prominent figure in the health sector, brings a wealth of experience and a dedication to promoting innovation, accessibility, and health equity.

The Boston Globe stages first Working Mothers Summit to empower caregivers in the workforce BOSTON, March 12, 2025
news.summary: Be a part of the first-ever Working Mothers Summit in Boston on March 12, 2025, where Globe journalists, regional leaders, and advocates will come together for engaging discussions and community strengthening. Showcasing support for working mothers, this event promises valuable insights and empowerment opportunities for attendees.

LFP Battery Market to grow at 9.9% CAGR, driven by EV and renewable energy demand. Global market valued at USD 8618 million.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of March 12, 2025, the LFP Battery Market has been categorized by type into Prismatic LFP Battery, Soft Pack LFP Battery, and Cylindrical LFP Battery, and by application into Energy Storage and Electric Vehicle usage. The worldwide market for LFP Battery had a value of USD 8618 Million in the specified year.

news.headline: Mexico's BNPL market set to reach $6.09 billion in 2025, with 33.5% growth. Key players include Klarna, Atome, Hapi, Mercado Pago, Oxxo Pay, PagaTodo.
news.summary: Dublin, - The latest report on Mexico's Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) market has been released, offering detailed insights and opportunities for businesses and investments. The BNPL payment sector in Mexico is projected to see a significant annual growth rate of 33.5%, reaching a total market value of US$6.09 billion by 2025. Between 2021 and 2024, the country's BNPL market demonstrated strong expansion, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5. The report includes over 75 key performance indicators covering market size, end-use sectors, market share, product analysis, business models, and demographic information, providing a comprehensive overview for potential investors and industry professionals.

AI & 3D scanners reshape $6B dental imaging market. New reports offer insights for CEOs, CFOs, & managers.
news.summary: New reports on dental imaging have been released, offering detailed analysis of the Global, European, and United States markets. The reports cater to CEOs, CFOs, and product/marketing managers in the dental industry, providing crucial information. The data covers important aspects and trends in the dental imaging sector, aiding professionals in making informed decisions. This information will be valuable for those seeking in-depth knowledge about market conditions and opportunities.

StoneEagle appoints Nicolle Lamb as VP of Marketing to drive growth strategies in automotive industry. Richardson, Texas. March 12, 2025.
news.summary: An experienced marketing executive, Lamb has been chosen to lead StoneEagle's efforts in improving brand visibility and customer interaction. The appointment was made public in Richardson, Texas on March 12, 2025. StoneEagle®, known for its innovations in automotive sector solutions, is looking to enhance its growth strategies under Lamb's leadership.

news.headline: Greenland commences coalition talks following voter rejection of Trump.
Ethereum dropped to $1.6K with potential for a 15% further decline. TVL at $45.6B, fees at $46.28M. Analyst sees support at $1.6K-$1.9K range.
news.summary: The price of Ethereum's native token, Ether (ETH), dropped below $2,000 on March 10 and hit a multi-year low of $1,752 on March 11. Onchain data and technical analysis suggest a potential additional 15% drop in the coming weeks. The realized price of ETH fell below $2,054 for the first time since February 2023, indicating widespread unrealized losses for holders. The market value to realized value (MVRV) ratio dropped to 0.93, reflecting a 7% average loss for all ETH holders. Ethereum's total value locked (TVL) decreased to $45.6 billion, down 41% from its peak. Total fees paid on the network dropped to $46.28 million, the lowest since July 2020, showing weakening network engagement. Glassnode noted that the $1.6K-$1.9K range for Ether is attractive, with potential support at $1,900 and a resistance level at $2.2K. An anonymous analyst suggests a floor price for Ethereum between $1,600 and $1,900, with a high swing target at $2,500. The article emphasizes that investment decisions carry risks and urges readers to conduct their research.

news.headline: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei in response to US military threats: Iran can retaliate and will definitely do so.
Sun Auto Tire & Service opens 7th Plaza Tire Service in Kentucky, making it their 80th location; company now has 514 nationwide.
news.summary: Sun Auto Tire & Service has introduced its 80th Plaza Tire Service branch, marking the 7th establishment in Kentucky. The company now oversees a total of 514 sites across the country. The latest addition in Murray, KY signifies Sun Auto's commitment to steady expansion. The news was released on March 12, 2025 via PRNewswire.

news.headline: Rainier Club and Kit Merker unveil Merker Hall, a co-working space in Seattle downtown. Merker donated generously.
news.summary: In Seattle, the Rainier Club, a prestigious historic private social club, has partnered with local tech investor and entrepreneur Kit Merker to unveil Merker Hall, a new modern collaboration and workspace located in downtown Seattle. The grand opening of Merker Hall follows a generous donation made by Merker to the Rainier Club. This donation has facilitated enhancements within the club and allowed for investments in member amenities such as private phone booths, upgraded Wi-Fi, and adjustable standing/sitting options. This collaboration marks a significant development for both the Rainier Club and the local entrepreneurial community, providing a cutting-edge workspace for professionals in the heart of the city.

news.headline: NRG Energy invests $2.5 MM in Equilibrium Energy for AI optimization, tackling grid volatility.
news.summary: In Houston, NRG Energy Inc. disclosed a $2.5 million investment in Equilibrium Energy. Equilibrium Energy utilizes AI to improve energy portfolio optimization. NRG's goal with this investment is to enhance market intelligence and develop strategies to combat grid instability due to factors like increased demand, sporadic renewable energy production, and severe weather conditions. NRG emphasized their commitment to backing inventive technologies that enhance the energy sector.

news.headline: Strike CEO Jack Mallers predicts Bitcoin could become the dominant store of value, with the global market valued at $400-500 trillion. Bitcoin's market cap is $1.5 trillion, indicating large growth potential.
news.summary: Jack Mallers, CEO of Strike, emphasized Bitcoin's increasing dominance in the store of value sector worldwide, which is estimated to be worth between $400 to $500 trillion. During the New York Bitcoin Investor Week held from Feb. 24 to Feb. 28, Mallers discussed how Bitcoin, with a market cap of $1.5 trillion, is still at an early adoption stage. He believes Bitcoin is positioned to capture a significant share of the store of value market, where assets are primarily held for preserving wealth rather than immediate consumption. Mallers highlighted the strong product market fit of Bitcoin as a store of value asset.

Trump: I can do financial deals that are bad for Russia.

February's CPI showed core inflation cooling more than expected amid consumer caution. S&P 500 futures jumped.
news.summary: In February, the consumer price index revealed a larger than anticipated decrease in core inflation, indicating consumer hesitancy. Concurrently, S&P 500 futures experienced a significant increase in value. This decline in CPI inflation was attributed to a decrease in travel under the Trump administration.

news.headline: Data reveals that cities on the West Coast have superior credit accessibility compared to others.
Cresco Labs reports Q4 revenue of $175.91M, down from $188.24M a year ago. Operating cash flow $29M, free cash flow $27M. CEO plans growth in 2025.
news.summary: Cresco Labs Inc. (OTC:CRLBF) disclosed a fourth-quarter revenue of $175.91 million, which is a decrease from $188.24 million in the previous year but surpassed the estimated $172.13 million. The operating cash flow for the fourth quarter was $29 million, with free cash flow amounting to $27 million. A recent study noted that the valuations of cannabis stocks do not anticipate federal reform. The CEO, Charlie Bachtell, mentioned that in 2024, the company focused on efficiency, profitability, and achieved a record-high free cash flow. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Westmount Realty Capital marks 40 years in commercial real estate, founded in 1985 by Cliff Booth, expanding into multiple sectors.
news.summary: Dallas-based Westmount Realty Capital is marking its 40th anniversary as a prominent player in the commercial real estate industry. Established in 1985 by Chairman Cliff Booth, the company has earned a reputation as a reliable partner for both institutional and private investors. Specializing in value-add and opportunistic approaches, Westmount operates within the multifamily, industrial, and office segments. Booth, hailing from Montreal, relocated to Dallas in 1979, laying the foundation for the company's success. With a focus on growth, innovative investments, and industry leadership, Westmount continues to thrive.

news.headline: Steel Dynamics sells $600M in 5.250% Notes due 2035 and $400M in 5.750% Notes due in undisclosed year.
news.summary: Fort Wayne-based Steel Dynamics, Inc. disclosed on March 12, 2025, the successful sale of $600 million in 5.250% Notes due 2035 (the "2035 Notes") and $400 million in 5.750% Notes due in the near future. The sale, completed through NASDAQ/GS under the symbol STLD, resulted in a total aggregate principal amount of $1 billion.

news.headline: Netherlands BNPL market to reach $10.29 billion by 2025, estimated to be a $16.4 billion market by 2030. Major players include Klarna and Afterpay.
news.summary: A report on buy now pay later (BNPL) business and investment opportunities in the Netherlands has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. According to the report, the BNPL payment market in the Netherlands is projected to increase by 14.0% annually, reaching a value of US$10.29 billion by 2025. The BNPL market in the country saw significant growth from 2021 to 2024.

LendingTree and Innervate collaborate for a three-year strategic partnership to enhance ad performance and content orchestration.
news.summary: The company LendingTree from Charlotte, N.C. announced on March 12, 2025, that it has chosen Innervate for its real-time experimentation, cross-channel orchestration, and capacity to unify data-driven content strategies. LendingTree, Inc., which operates the prominent LendingTree.com, is known as the top online financial services provider in the country.

news.headline: Simmons Bank opens new regional office in Jonesboro, Ark., with 4 drive-thru lanes. 64 branches total.
news.summary: Simmons Bank celebrated the grand opening of a new regional office in Jonesboro, Arkansas on March 12, 2025. Situated at 1720 S Caraway, the branch offers comprehensive services and includes four convenient drive-thru lanes. This addition comes as part of Simmons Bank's network of around 64 full-service branches across the region.

news.headline: ILIC excelled in 2024, surpassing $1 billion milestones in the SSA industry, showcasing strong results.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas on March 12, 2025, Independent Life Insurance Company (ILIC) made notable strides in the structured settlement annuity (SSA) sector last year. Despite competing against major life insurers in America, ILIC reached remarkable milestones in 2024 by exceeding $1 billion in revenue.

news.headline: Koma Precision to exclusively distribute D'Andrea U-Axis Heads in US and Mexico as per agreement.
news.summary: In East Windsor, Connecticut on March 12, 2025, Koma Precision, a prominent supplier of high-precision machine tool accessories, has unveiled a new exclusive distribution deal with D'Andrea, a well-known manufacturer of U-axis heads. Through this collaboration, Koma Precision will serve as the sole distributor of D'Andrea's products, expanding its portfolio and enhancing its offerings within the industry.

North America self-propelled cordless lawn mower market sales to hit $5.0 billion by 2035, growing from $2.4 billion in 2024, driven by eco-friendly trends, advancements, and government support. Major players include WORX, Honda, John Deere, Husqvarna, and Toro.
news.summary: The North America self-propelled cordless lawn mower industry, valued at US$2.4 billion in 2024, is projected to grow at a CAGR of 6.8% from 2025 to 2035, reaching approximately US$5.0 billion by 2035. The growth is driven by the rising demand for eco-friendly landscaping solutions, advancements in battery technology, and increasing adoption of smart gardening tools. Factors such as increasing urbanization, emphasis on sustainable practices, and technological innovations are expected to drive demand. Key players in the industry include WORX, Honda Power Equipment, John Deere, Husqvarna Group, and The Toro Company. Government initiatives promoting sustainable landscaping and noise regulations further contribute to market expansion.

news.headline: Arcos Dorados Q4 earnings show EPS beat at 28 cents, sales at $1.144 billion (down 2.7% YoY). South Latin America shows strength.
news.summary: Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO) announced fourth-quarter earnings per share of 28 cents on Wednesday, surpassing the expected 21 cents. Quarterly sales stood at $1.144 billion, a 2.7% decrease from the previous year, falling short of the estimated $1.152 billion. Systemwide comparable sales rose by 21.5%, in line with inflation rates. In Brazil, revenues were $445.9 million, marking a 7.7% decline year over year. The North Latin American Division reported revenues of $303.1 million, a 0.9% increase compared to the same period last year. Meanwhile, the South Latin American Division recorded sales of $395.2 million, attributed to a significant 61.8% rise in systemwide comparable sales. For the complete article, visit Benzinga.com.
